screens.title: Status
screens._note: screen_status shows WIFI/SSID/IP/RSSI/BLE-id/SIGNALK/HEAP/PSRAM/UPTIME/BUILD - all device-local or const values with no SignalK path. square-480 maxTiles=4: modeled as 2x2 IP/SIGNALK/HEAP/UPTIME text tiles. All bindings are kind:local/const (valid per config schema). The square-480 capability manifest advertises sources:[signalk] only, so every tile here fails the capability (caps) layer by design - this screen is intrinsically local-only diagnostics. See validation report.
